value.found_quote: **`unsandboxed`** | `unsandboxed(prefix)` or `unsandboxed(*)` | Matches commands by exact word/token prefix. Commands matching this grant will be executed outside of container isolation (only applicable when terminal sandboxing is enabled).
value.rationale: The page describes a fine-grained permissions engine with interactive prompt cards (Ask mode) and a distinct `unsandboxed` action that allows commands to be executed outside container isolation, versus the normal `command` action which runs within sandbox restrictions. This substantiates the claim that confirmation prompts adapt to let users run a command with or without sandbox restrictions.
